assets.name: brand.logoMark
assets.use: Primary round W logo. Use in app header, splash screen, profile, favicon, and small brand moments.

assets.name: brand.wordmarkWithTagline
assets.use: Large brand lockup. Use on marketing header, app store preview, and optional landing pages. Do not use inside small mobile nav.

assets.name: login.background
assets.use: Full screen desert background for login and welcome/onboarding screen. Layer copy and CTA over it.

assets.name: session.background
assets.use: Full screen desert background for the stillness timer/session screen. Keep timer and controls centered.

assets.name: program.desertHero
assets.use: Wide landscape art for the Desert program overview, program cards, or empty states.

assets.name: card.desertLandscape
assets.use: Smaller card version for dashboard cards, progress cards, and feature panels.

assets.name: status.notCompleted
assets.use: Status chip for unfinished day cards or lesson detail.

assets.name: status.completed
assets.use: Status chip for completed days or reflection steps.

assets.name: status.inProgress
assets.use: Status chip for active session or day in progress.

assets.name: icon.home
assets.use: Line icon for home actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.calendar
assets.use: Line icon for calendar actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.profile
assets.use: Line icon for profile actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.book
assets.use: Line icon for book actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.bell
assets.use: Line icon for bell actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.leaf
assets.use: Line icon for leaf actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.clock
assets.use: Line icon for clock actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.pencil
assets.use: Line icon for pencil actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.menu
assets.use: Line icon for menu actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.settings
assets.use: Line icon for settings actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.back
assets.use: Line icon for back actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.close
assets.use: Line icon for close actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.more
assets.use: Line icon for more actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.check
assets.use: Line icon for check actions or navigation.

assets.name: icon.timer
assets.use: Line icon for timer actions or navigation.

brand.logoMarkArtistic.use: Primary app logo mark, splash screen mark, app icon source. This version matches the more hand-crafted W and circle dunes mark from the reference.

brand.wArtisticFlare.use: Standalone W mark for large centered brand treatments on login, splash, and welcome screens.

session.backgroundRealisticDunes.use: Primary full-screen background for the stillness timer/session screen. Use behind the timer and session controls.

login.backgroundRealisticDunes.use: Primary full-screen background for login, welcome, and onboarding pages when a realistic desert feel is desired.

program.desertRealisticWide.use: Wide hero/card desert image for program cards, Desert overview, and marketing panels.
